Rearrange the words to make meaningful sentences 
 come/ Where/ ,Tony/ do/ you/ from/?/
answers: Where come from you do, Tony?
Where do you come from, Tony?
Where you do come from, Tony?
do you come from where, Tony?
questions.correctAnswer: Where do you come from, Tony?

questions.question:
Rearrange the words to make meaningful sentences 
 The/ will/ sunny/ next/ weather/ be/ week/./
answers: The weather will be sunny next weekend.
The weather is sunny next weekend.
The weather was sunny next weekend.
The weather are sunny next weekend.
questions.correctAnswer: The weather will be sunny next weekend.

questions.question:
Rearrange the words to make meaningful sentences 
 The/ cheap/ in/ Ha Long/ food/ is/ Bay/./
answers: Ha Long Bay is cheap in the food.
The food in Ha Long Bay is cheap.
The food is cheap in Ha Long Bay.
The food is in Ha Long Bay cheap.
questions.correctAnswer: The food is cheap in Ha Long Bay.

questions.question: Which sentence uses the correct comparative form?
answers: This book is more interesting than that one.
This book is interestinger than that one.
This book is most interesting than that one.
This book is interestinger that one.
questions.correctAnswer: This book is more interesting than that one.

questions.question:
Reorder these words to make meaningful sentences 
 and/ Chocolate/ lot/ of/ fat/ has/ a/ sugar/.
answers: Chocolate has a lot and of fat sugar.
Sugar has a lot of fat and chocolate.
Fat has a lot of chocolate and sugar.
Chocolate has a lot of fat and sugar.
questions.correctAnswer: Chocolate has a lot of fat and sugar.

questions.question:
Reorder these words to make meaningful sentences 
 summer/ Where/ go/ last/ did/ you/ holiday/ ?/
answers: Where did you go summer last holiday?
Where you did go last summer holiday?
Did you go where last summer holiday?
Where did you go last summer holiday?
questions.correctAnswer: Where did you go last summer holiday?

questions.question:
Reorder these words to make meaningful sentences 
 Hanoi/ people/ has/ a lot of/ and/ tall buildings/ ./
answers: Hanoi has a lot of people and tall buildings.
Hanoi has a lot of buildings and tall people.
Hanoi has a lot of tall buildings and people.
Hanoi has a lot of tall people and buildings.
questions.correctAnswer: Hanoi has a lot of people and tall buildings.

questions.question:
Rewrite the following sentences 
 There are not so many people in my village. (have)
answers: My village has so many people
My village have so many people
My village don’t have so many people
My village doesn’t have so many people
questions.correctAnswer: My village doesn’t have so many people

questions.question:
Rewrite the following sentences 
 London isn’t as beautiful as New York. (more…. than)
answers: New York is more beautiful than London.
London is more beautiful than New York.
New York isn't more beautiful than London.
New York is beautifuler than London.
questions.correctAnswer: New York is more beautiful than London.

questions.question:
Rewrite the following sentences 
 It will be stormy and windy tomorrow. (weather)
answers: The weather is stormy and windy tomorrow.
The weather will stormy and windy tomorrow.
The weather are be stormy and windy tomorrow.
The weather will be stormy and windy tomorrow.
questions.correctAnswer: The weather will be stormy and windy tomorrow.
